records.m_Talk_ENG: When the Three Beasts' grew enough power to gain an intelligence of their own, they figured out that the only thing that could satisfy their bottomless hunger was humanity.

8v? What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Becoming one with the world by intertwining with fate itself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Becoming one with the world by intertwining with fate itself.

8v?
